title: YTP: Zelda is MAH BOI!!!
description:
This video came in 2nd place for "The Most Funny" award in some sort of contest from the uh....Youtube Poop Awards Committee (omg......) just so you know, since I'm sure you are all duly impressed by this awesome acomplishment.

The King is going of to aid against the evil forces of himself, but assures Zelda that she is HIS BOI!!!!!!

Kind of short, but I may make a part 2
